ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jan-14-2019 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-17-2018 Continued To Jan-14-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney to appear on January 14, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear and a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Anasse. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-17-2018 Continued To Dec-17-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Steven Small appeared by telephone for Petitioner.

The Court informed Mr. Small that an inventory and appraisal, and either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration need to be filed. Mr. Small requested a 60-day continuance stating that he will file a petition to distribute and the inventory, and that there is only a house in the estate. Status on close of estate is continued to December 17, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
